decisions.rationale: IR/decompose re-read confirms ai_RNbBHXSx is the journal card root (G - recent journal) with no separate slot-wrapper bubble id unlike chat (ai_RNbBHXSM wrapper vs ai_RNbBHXSN card). DASH-01 scaffold DashboardSlot and DashboardJournalPreviewCard both emit ai_RNbBHXSx, producing nested duplicate markers; AC-2 passes because the card root correctly owns the named ui_ref and all child anchors render. ui_evidence is partial (not fail) for selector uniqueness only. Omitting the bubble id on the journal slot wrapper is a one-line parity-tooling fix matching the chat pattern; does not block DASH-07 depends_on or fail any AC.

Finding confirmed: frontend/supabase has no chatmessage/chatconversation migrations and chatPreviewApi falls back to profiles.onboarding_data when tables are absent. criteria_audit AC-3 passes with explicit gap documented; FV-1 passes via fetchChatPreview + onboarding_data fallback. AC-3 wording requires Supabase read with best-effort behavior, not live in-app chat history sync. CHAT-05 decompose scope owns chatmessage/chatconversation persistence wiring; DASH-06 depends_on does not include CHAT-05. Matches DASH-04 C-1 schema-defer precedent — advance OK, land live preview sync when CHAT module persists messages.

Incomplete-profile Dashboard.tsx branch (lines 77–160) intentionally shows onboarding CTA and disabled placeholder skeleton widgets rather than full dashboard widgets. DASH-06 decompose scope and ACs validate the complete-profile path where chatPreview and journalPreview slots render DashboardChatPreviewCard and DashboardJournalPreviewCard. Pre-assessment empty right-column anchors are brownfield page-level conditional UX outside DASH-06 target_files; DASH-07 assigns onboarding-incomplete banner and conditional overlay behavior. Wiring previews into the incomplete branch is a valid enhancement but not an AC violation on the primary dashboard path.

CHAT_PROMPT_CHIPS render correct IR copy and Link to=/chat satisfies FV-4 (interactive navigation targets, not dead UI). Bubble chip workflows may pre-seed conversation context, but no DASH-06 AC mandates router state/query prompt seeding. DS-06 triage deferred similar chip-to-consumer wiring until CHAT module supports seeded prompts. Low-priority workflow-parity backlog; defer prompt-key propagation when CHAT route store accepts initial message context.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 journal slot duplicate ai_RNbBHXSx marker (parity-tooling polish); C-2 live chat preview sync to CHAT-05 persistence wave; C-3 incomplete-onboarding branch preview wiring to DASH-07 onboarding UX; C-4 chip prompt seeding to CHAT module when route store supports it.
